title: ligusticum rubellum
intro: Ligusticum rubellum, also known as Chinese lovage or mountain lovage, is a perennial plant in the parsley family native to China, India, and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ligusticum rubellum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Ligusticum rubellum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
